texto: Spiritual victory is not something you earn - it is something you accept. The Christian life is not so much about what you have done - it's about what Christ has done. It's not so much about how strong you are - it's about how strong God is.
explicacao: Citação de Alan D. Wright sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Spiritual victory is not something you earn - it is something you accept. The Christian life is n…” articula fe, faith, reflexao em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
